title: Cozy Chive Grille
description: A bitter, juicy, cozy Peruvian dish featuring chives and served as a gluten-free-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: Grilled Sirloin
ingredients.notes: Ensure to grill at a safe temperature (at least 145°F for medium-rare)

ingredients.name: Green Onions (Chives)
ingredients.notes: Trim and use the green parts only

ingredients.name: Gluten-Free Breading Mix
ingredients.notes: Optional, to coat Sirloin for added texture

instructions: Prepare the chives by washing and trimming the green parts only.
If using breading mix, mix it with a little bit of water until you get a pasty consistency.
Season the Sirloin evenly on both sides with salt and pepper.
Apply the seasoned glaze to the breaded or unbreaded side, if applicable.
Grill the Sirloin over medium-high heat for about 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through (internal temperature should reach at least 135°F for medium-rare).
Squeeze fresh lime juice over both sides of the grilled Sirloin to add a tangy flavor.
Cut the chives into bite-sized pieces and arrange them around the grilled Sirloin for garnish.
